channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eagles' Saquon Barkley sets franchise single-game rushing record in statement win over Rams
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles running back Saquon Barkley broke out for 255 rushing yards on Sunday night as the team routed the Los Angeles Rams, 37-20.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Short-handed 49ers stomped by Packers in 38-10 road loss
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) -- Josh Jacobs rushed for 106 yards and matched a career high with three touchdowns and the Green Bay Packers trounced the short-handed San Francisco 49ers 38-10 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Injured Joel Embiid, Paul George watch from the 76ers' bench once again
item.description: All-Stars Paul George and Joel Embiid both missed Sunday's game against the Los Angeles Clippers with knee injuries.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Maverick McNealy birdies the last hole at Sea Island to finally become PGA Tour winner
item.description: Maverick McNealy has learned in his five years on the PGA Tour that trying to win a tournament is “designed to make you feel as uncomfortable as you possibly can.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No. 1 South Carolina women stunned by fifth-ranked UCLA 77-62, ending Gamecocks' 43-game win streak
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Londynn Jones scored 15 points, making all five of her 3-pointers, and fifth-ranked UCLA stunned No. 1 South Carolina 77-62 on Sunday, ending the Gamecocks’ overall 43-game winning streak and their run of 33 consecutive road victories.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Seibert misses an extra point late as the Commanders lose their 3rd in a row, 34-26 to the Cowboys
item.description: Austin Seibert missed his second extra point of the game with 21 seconds left after Washington’s Jayden Daniels and Terry McLaurin connected on an 86-yard touchdown, Dallas’ Juanyeh Thomas returned the ensuing onside kick attempt for a touchdown, and the Cowboys pulled out a 34-26 victory Sunday tha
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jannik Sinner's 2024: 2 Slam Grand titles, a doping case and a Davis Cup title for Italy
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Jannik Sinner was in the locker room, getting ready to go on court and try to win a match that would give Italy its second Davis Cup title in a row, when his teammate, Matteo Berrettini, was asked about being so close to a championship.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Verstappen still manages to win 4th straight F1 title in one of worst seasons of his Red Bull career
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Max Verstappen won an unbelievable 19 races last season that included an incredible streak of 10 in a row in what would arguably go down as one of the greatest years in Formula 1 history.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Simone Biles' husband, Jonathan Owens, mimics wife's gymnast pose for fumble recovery celebration
item.description: Chicago Bears safety Jonathan Owens paid homage to his wife, Simone Biles, after recovering a fumble that he forced against the Minnesota Vikings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mike Tyson offered six figures to show off rear end following viral moment ahead of Jake Paul fight
item.description: Thanks to the viral moment where Mike Tyson was found to be wearing chaps without covering his rear end, he can now make some extra money because of it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Appalachian State fans pelt James Madison players with snowballs before game
item.description: As the James Madison Dukes were entering the field from the tunnel, Appalachian State Mountaineer fans bombarded the players with snowballs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Auburn wins 43-41, four-OT thriller over playoff hopeful No. 15 Texas A&M
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Auburn fans finally had a big win to celebrate. Texas A&M, and perhaps the Southeastern Conference, not so much. Payton Thorne hit KeAndre Lambert-Smith for a two-point play in the fourth overtime to lift the Tigers to a 43-41 victory over No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After fans storm field early, No. 21 Arizona St stops Hail Mary try for 28-23 win over No. 14 BYU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Cam Skattebo was the workhorse once again for Arizona State, carrying the Sun Devils on his back by rushing for 147 yards and three touchdowns. His reward was a well-earned celebration with fans. Twice. Skattebo had another big game, Sam Leavitt threw for 247 yards and No.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michkov scores in overtime, Flyers rally to beat Blackhawks 3-2
item.description: Matvei Michkov scored a power-play goal in overtime as the Flyers overcame a two-goal deficit in the third period to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026 after Milton; new ballpark deal dies: Tampa Bay Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WGN 9

item.title: Giants release quarterback Daniel Jones just days after benching him
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — The Daniel Jones era in New York is over. The Giants quarterback was granted his release on Friday by the team just days after the franchise said it was benching him in favor of third-stringer Tommy DeVito.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ohtani wins unanimous MVP after historic first season with Dodgers
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers' superstar Shohei Ohtani is the 2024 National League Most Valuable Player. It was a unanimous decision to award the Japanese phenom the 2024 MVP, and in doing so, create another historic moment as he becomes the first full-time designated hitter to win it.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Aaron Judge earns second AL honor in 3 seasons
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Aaron Judge earned his second American League honor on Thursday. Judge led the major leagues with 58 homers, 144 RBIs, and 133 walks while hitting .322. When Judge won his first MVP award in 2022, he received 28 first-place votes while Ohtani got the other two.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No ball at Tropicana Field in 2026; new ballpark deal dies: Rays
item.description: The St. Petersburg City Council has voted to spend over $23 million to repair Tropicana Field after Hurricane Milton destroyed the roof on the home of the Tampa Bay Rays.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mike Evans trending towards playing against the Giants on Sunday
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are looking to get back on track after four straight losses against the Giants, who swapped starting quarterbacks after losing five in a row.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cubs trade for Cleveland reliever Eli Morgan; Wisdom DFA'd
item.description: CLEVELAND, Ind. — The Cubs are trading for Cleveland relief pitcher Eli Morgan. As a result of adding Morgan to the 40-man, Patrick Wisdom was designated for assignment. Morgan, 28, had the best season of his career in 2024 with a 1.93 ERA with Cleveland in 42 innings.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Jazz lose to Lakers, fall to 3-11 this season
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - While the Lakers' two all-stars LeBron James and Anthony Davis had their way with the Utah Jazz Tuesday night, it was L.A.'s rookie that did the most damage.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Connor Bedard trying to break out of slump as the Blackhawks struggle to score
item.description: Bedard was terrific last season, living up to the considerable hype that has followed him around for years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
